items.question: Do I need an appointment, or can I walk in?
items.answer: Walk-ins are welcome when we have an opening, but booking ahead guarantees your time and therapist. You can book online in under a minute.

items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: We're open every day, 9:00am to 9:00pm — including weekends and most holidays.

items.question: Do you speak Chinese?
items.answer: Yes — several of our therapists and front-desk team speak Mandarin and Cantonese. You can book and be served entirely in English or 中文.

items.question: What should I expect on my first visit?
items.answer: Arrive a few minutes early, tell us your goals and any areas to focus on or avoid, and we'll match you with the right therapist and pressure. You undress only to your comfort and are always professionally draped.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: Card, cash, Apple Pay, and Spa Paradise gift cards. Nothing is charged when you book — you pay after your treatment.

items.question: Do prices include gratuity?
items.answer: No — gratuity is appreciated but always at your discretion. There's no service charge and no surprise add-ons; the menu price is the treatment price.

items.question: What's your cancellation policy?
items.answer: Life happens. Give us 4 hours' notice and there's no charge, ever. Repeated no-shows may be asked to prepay.

items.question: Are prices the same for everyone?
items.answer: Yes. Published prices, same for walk-ins, regulars, English or 中文 — what you see is what you pay.

items.question: Do you offer memberships?
items.answer: Yes — our monthly membership includes one 60-minute massage at a member rate plus discounts on everything else. Ask at the desk or see our packages page.

items.question: What's the difference between deep tissue and Swedish massage?
items.answer: Swedish uses long, flowing strokes for whole-body relaxation. Deep tissue uses slower, more focused pressure for stubborn tension and knots. Not sure which you want? Tell your therapist your goal and they'll adjust.

items.question: What if the pressure is too light or too firm?
items.answer: Just say so — during the session is perfect. Your comfort guides the work, and adjusting pressure is completely normal.

items.question: Do you have a couples room?
items.answer: Yes. Our private couples room seats two therapists side by side, and you can add tea service with the Couples Retreat package.

items.question: Is prenatal massage safe?
items.answer: Our prenatal massage is performed by a certified therapist using safe, side-lying positioning, and is generally suited to months 4 through 9. If you have a high-risk pregnancy or any concerns, please check with your doctor first.

items.question: What is cupping, and does it leave marks?
items.answer: Cupping uses gentle suction to ease muscle tension and support circulation. It can leave temporary circular marks that usually fade within a few days.

items.question: What is foot reflexology?
items.answer: Reflexology applies pressure to specific points on the feet for a deeply relaxing experience. It's done in our recliner lounge, fully clothed from the ankle up.

items.question: Which facial is right for my skin?
items.answer: Our Signature Facial suits most skin, the Deep-Cleansing Facial targets congestion and oil, and the Anti-Aging Facial focuses on firming. Our esthetician will tailor any of them to your skin on the day.

items.question: How do gift cards work?
items.answer: Step 1: choose an amount or treatment gift card. Step 2: complete secure checkout online (promo codes can be entered at checkout). Step 3: we email a gift certificate code after purchase. Step 4: the recipient books any service and presents the code at the front desk.

items.question: How does someone redeem a gift card?
items.answer: Book online, by phone, or in person, then present the gift certificate code at check-in. Our front desk applies the value to the visit.

items.question: Can I buy gift cards for my team or clients?
items.answer: Yes — we offer corporate and bulk gifting. Use the inquiry form on the gift cards page and we'll help you set it up.

items.question: Is there parking?
items.answer: Yes — free parking is available at 12 Grove St, and we're a short drive from downtown Middletown and Route 17/I-84.
